texto: Family myths are cherished by the people who--however unwittingly--have brought them into being. In my own situation, what my father was really saying to me during that last unfortunate phone call was that I had shattered our family's myth: the myth of a close and tight-knit family in which everyone was in complete agreement about everything, that is, in complete agreement with my father. I had violated one of the tenets of this myth in a way that was unforgivable to him. For that my punishment was to be expelled from the family.
explicacao: Citação de Mark Sichel sobre temas ligados a familia. “Family myths are cherished by the people who--however unwittingly--have brought them into being. …” articula familia, father, rift em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como rift e som.
